'''Chamberlyn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion of Naboo]]. Chamberlyn became a leader in the [[Naboo Resistance|resistance]] against the invader, and was responsible for analyzing and discovering weaknesses in the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Chamberlyn later accompanied [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] in an assault on the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] during Amidala's bid to retake [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], helping her capture the Federation's Viceroy [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]].

==Biography==
Chamberlyn was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the volunteer [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="CCG" /> and by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> had attained the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]].<ref name="CCG" /> In 32 BBY,<ref name="NEC" /> Naboo was [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|army]], and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] was forced to escape from Naboo to the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> After her departure, Chamberlyn became a leader in one of the [[Naboo Resistance|resistance cells]] that fought against the invaders.<ref name="CCG" /> When Amidala returned to Naboo with the intention to retake it, the leader of the RNSF, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] rallied together all the resistance fighters for an [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|assault]] on the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], in which Amidala hoped to capture the Federation's [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] and end the Federation's occupation of the planet. Chamberlyn then joined the Queen in an attack on the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]].<ref name="TPM" />

As Chamberlyn and a number of other Royal Guards, led by Amidala and Panaka, moved through the palace, they were confronted by a detachment of battle droids. In an attempt to circumvent the droids, Panaka destroyed a nearby window with his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]; he, the Queen, Chamberlyn and several other RNSF members then climbed outside onto the windowsill and used their [[Ascension gun/Legends|ascension guns]] to reach an upper level of the Palace. As they moved in through a corridor, however, the group was surrounded by a number of battle droids, and Amidala ordered her men to lay down their weapons. Chamberlyn and the others were taken to the Palace's throne room to, where Gunray tried to force the Queen into signing the treaty that authorized the Federation's occupation of Naboo. At that point, however, one of Amidala's [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]], [[Sabé/Legends|Sabé]], disguised as the Queen and leading a number of guards, appeared in a corridor leading to the throne room. Exclaiming that Gunray's occupation had ended, Sabé and her men attacked Gunray's battle droids, and the Viceroy, thinking Sabé to be the real Queen, sent most of his forces after her.<ref name="TPM" />

The distraction allowed Amidala to open a secret compartment inside her throne and take out a pair of hidden blasters from there, which she and Panaka used to deal with the rest of the droids. Chamberlyn and the other guards present at the scene then sealed the door to the throne room, rearmed themselves with the fallen battle droids' blasters, and took Gunray and his aide [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]] under guard. Meanwhile, the Federation's droid control ship was destroyed during a concurrent space battle by the young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], deactivating all battle droids on the planet, and liberating Naboo.<ref name="TPM" />

==Personality and traits==
As a resistance leader, Chamberlyn was known for discovering and analyzing battle droids' weaknesses. During the attack on the Theed Palace, Chamberlyn was armed with a [[S-5 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|S-5 heavy blaster pistol]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chamberlyn first appeared as an unnamed background extra in [[George Lucas]]' [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], portrayed by an uncredited actor. The character received a name in the [[2001]] ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] by [[Decipher]]
